## Runtime.IRuntimeRecipeVersion.scale() method

Scales this version to a target weight.

**Signature:**

```typescript
scale(targetWeight: Grams, options?: IVersionScaleOptions): Result<IRuntimeScaledRecipeVersion>;
```
